query: Craft an optimized generation prompt from this page spec and design system so I can paste it into an external screen-generation tool.
Phase 6 asset generation — turn the spec into prompts for wireframes / page designs / images.
Generate the visual assets for these screens from the specs using the style library and reference images.
Write the development-ready page specification (content, interactions, spacing, typography) for this screen.
Create and maintain the design system — extract shared components and define the design tokens.
Map our business goals to personas with their wants and fears — build the trigger map.
